title: Spangles
writer: Nellie Revell, Hugh Hoffman, Leah Baird
actors: Marian Nixon, Pat O'Malley, Hobart Bosworth
plot: Marion Nixon plays the title character, a gorgeous bareback rider with a travelling circus. Spangles falls in love with Dick (Pat O'Malley), a young fugitive from justice who uses the Big Top for a hideout.
